title: First Platinum Vol 1 box
wikitext:
[]: First Platinum Vol. 1 + box             Quote Post by Botsu » Sun Jan 02, 2011 9:04 pm Hello all, So waaaaaay back in the day, whilst scrounging my allowence and lawn-mowing money, as I both oogled my cousin's original box set, and walked around my local Best Buy store, I made the decision to buy Vol. 1 of the Evangelion Platinum edition, complete with NERV parking pass. I planned on buying them all at some point, but instead opted for the single DVD rather than the the Vol. 1 + Box, as I did not have the money, but needed to fill my middle school mind with the remastered goodness. Now that I have expendable income, I want that box. But I don't want to buy Vol. 1 again. I know that I will probably have to, but does anyone know of a way to just get the box, and not have to buy the disc again? Its only like 10 - 15 dollars, but I don't need 2 :-/ Help appreciated..

[]:             Quote Post by BiQ » Sun Jan 02, 2011 9:44 pm Can't you just sell the extra disc on ebay or somewhere?

[]:             Quote Post by supershinjiasukashipper » Sun Jan 02, 2011 10:07 pm If I were you I would keep your volume one disk for the nostalgia. I still have mine, along with the volume one I have in my box set. Actually, my sweet volume one was my first foray into Evangelion, I would only give it to someone special.

[]: Re: First Platinum Vol. 1 + box             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sun Jan 02, 2011 10:08 pm Botsu wrote: I know that I will probably have to, but does anyone know of a way to just get the box, and not have to buy the disc again?

[]:             Quote Post by Botsu » Sun Jan 02, 2011 11:14 pm yeah, okay. I guess I'll just buy the new Vol. 1, and then sell the new vol.1 that I get, and put my old one in the box. Of course this is after I take the second acquired parking pass, and actually put it on my car.

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Mon Jan 03, 2011 9:27 am I trade all my unwanted/repeat DVDs to a local used book/media store for store credit. Depending on the store, it's actually better than selling online. The one I go to in Raleigh, NC has a few out-of-print materials I've had a hard time finding on places like e-bay. But definitely try e-bay if you don't have a store like that near you.

[]:             Quote Post by supershinjiasukashipper » Mon Jan 03, 2011 12:16 pm I'm the only one here with a sense of nostalgia. Its cold being alone like this.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Mon Jan 03, 2011 2:59 pm supershinjiasukashipper wrote: I'm the only one here with a sense of nostalgia. Its cold being alone like this.

[]:             Quote Post by supershinjiasukashipper » Mon Jan 03, 2011 5:41 pm I know, but i'm emotionally attached to mine since it was my first eva anything. I'm half tempted to make a sex joke about it right now, but thats just a tad too creepy.

[]:             Quote Post by Trajan » Mon Jan 03, 2011 6:06 pm eBay or just renting it out to someone else would be easy solutions. I think amazon also has a feature where you sell back you old stuff.

[]:             Quote Post by Botsu » Mon Jan 03, 2011 8:30 pm Well, Amazon had the box for 10 bucks, so I got it. I can always sell the disc for probably that much alone...hopefully. EDIT: Well, I got reverse-ripped off. Today, waiting for me when I got home was my Vol 1 + box I ordered from amazon for 10 bucks. However, instead of Volume one and a box, it was EVERY volume IN the box. So now instead of not wanting to waste 2 vol 1s, I now have a complete duplicate. :-) :-)
